# UC-22.10.57 · HIPAA 164.308(a)(4)(ii)(B) — Cisco ISE Privileged Access Modification Audit

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance

*We continuously evidence HIPAA admin privilege modification on PHI-impacting NAC infrastructure. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.*

---

## Description

We continuously evidence HIPAA admin privilege modification on PHI-impacting NAC infrastructure.

## Value

HIPAA auditors require evidence of access modification. ISE admin role changes directly affect who can authorize access to PHI-bearing networks; this UC produces continuous evidence with attribution.

## Implementation

Daily. 6y retention (HIPAA standard).

## Evidence

Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with HIPAA tagging.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Grant a new admin super-admin. Evidence captured.

### Negative scenario

No role changes. Empty result.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.71 operational.
- `audit_evidence` with 6y retention.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.10.57: HIPAA — ISE Admin Role Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.10.57,reg=HIPAA,clause=164.308(a)(4)(ii)(B)
```

## SPL

```spl
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (60050, 60051, 60052, 60100) earliest=-1d
| eval hipaa_clause="164.308(a)(4)(ii)(B)", control="Access_Establishment_Modification"
| table _time, admin_user, admin_role, admin_action, source_ip, hipaa_clause
| collect index=audit_evidence
```

## Visualization

HIPAA dashboard: ISE admin role timeline.

## Known False Positives

1. Bulk role updates during planned admin reorg.

## References

- [HIPAA Security Rule](https://www.hhs.gov/hipaa/for-professionals/security/index.html)
